The Pay.com API is REST based and can be used to interact and manage resources.

Pay.com API has:
- Predictable resource-oriented URLs
- Accepts JSON-encoded request bodies
- Returns JSON-encoded responses

The API uses standard HTTP response codes, authentication, and verbs.

You can use the API in test mode, which does not affect your live data or interact with the banking networks.
